info.name: Ogani API Testing (Blackbox)
info.description: Postman collection for Ogani Backend API based on Table 3.17.

exec: pm.test("Success is true", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(String(jsonData.success)).to.eql("true"); });
pm.test("Extract Token", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); if(jsonData.data && jsonData.data.token) { pm.environment.set("token", jsonData.data.token); } });
pm.test("Success is false", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(String(jsonData.success)).to.eql("false"); });
pm.test("Success is false", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(String(jsonData.success)).to.eql("false"); });
pm.test("Success is true", function () { var jsonData = pm.response.json(); pm.expect(String(jsonData.success)).to.eql("true"); });
